# 09_REFERENCE_METHODS_BOUNDARY

Workbook and case memory are methodology/reference layers.

They may help with:
- explanations
- safe pattern selection
- risk awareness
- responsive workflow reminders
- accessibility reminders
- design-system reasoning

They must not prove:
- current Elementor control existence
- exact panel path
- installed-version support
- exact numeric values
- approved class names
- selected_candidate_id
- production readiness

If reference guidance conflicts with package, current UI, official docs, or project rules, do not use it as authority.
